title: organization — model relationships
description: Organization is the aggregate root of the sub-brand tree. Self-referential parent/children via `parent_id`. Owned by `tenants` (cascade delete). Referenced by `branches` (RESTRICT — cannot delete an Organization while any Branch belongs to it) and future planned aggregates (Teams, Facilities via Branch, Season). NEVER carries region_id or application_id (per tenancy-columns.md §5).

internal.description: The parent Organization in the hierarchy. Null = root node. Deleting a parent SET NULLs children — the delete only succeeds when descendants have already been reparented (observer refuses otherwise); SET NULL is a defense-in-depth against out-of-band deletes.
Every descendant node (self excluded). Uses the materialised tree_path for O(log N) BTREE-indexed LIKE prefix scan — faster than a recursive CTE and cache-friendly.
Every ancestor node (self excluded), in root-to-self order. Derived by splitting tree_path on the separator + fetching each id.

outbound.description: Every Organization belongs to exactly one Tenant. tenancy::TenantErased cascades hard-delete via this FK.

inbound.description: Every Branch carries an organization_id (required). Refused to delete an Organization while ANY Branch references it (`ORGANIZATION_IN_USE` 409).
Every Team carries an organization_id via branch. When a Team is added directly under an Organization (organization-wide team, no specific branch), this FK carries the value directly.

note_no_region_id: Organization does NOT carry region_id. Regions are ORTHOGONAL — see hierarchy.md §2. The join point is Branch, which carries FKs to BOTH `organization_id` AND `region_id`. Adding `region_id` to organizations would violate the non-goal in hierarchy.md §13.
note_no_application_id: Organization does NOT carry application_id. Application cascades through `tenant_id → tenants.application_id`. Enforced by tenancy-columns.md §2 — only 8 rows carry application_id directly, and Organization is not one of them.
note_no_scope_node_id: Organization is a scope-node ENTITY (referenced by scope_nodes.entity_id) — not a scope CONSUMER. Adding scope_node_id to the organizations table would violate tenancy-columns.md §4.

cascade_chain.description: When Organization is deleted (soft OR hard), the cascade chain is:
steps: 0. Observer refuses when is_default=true / has descendants / referenced by branches. If any refusal fires, cascade stops.
4. Branches referencing this org stay put — they were already refused-to-delete at step 0.
5. Retention (730 days) then hard-deletes via PurgeArchivedOrganizationsJob IF no descendants + no branches remain.
6. Hard-delete cascades to `owen-it/laravel-auditing`.audits rows via the auditable morph.
